creator: mefystofel@gmail.com
text:
Hi Josh,

Many thanks for your time and efforts, and sorry if this is not qualified as a bug. I've just tried to compile and use the latest open-vm-tools from https://people.freebsd.org/~jpaetzel/open-vm-tools.tar.gz.

It compiles fine, and I can start vmware-guestd, which results in proper detection of Guest OS (FreeBSD 11.1-BETA3) in vSphere Client, however starting vmware-kmod throws:

KLD vmmemctl.ko: depends on kernel - not available or version mismatch
linker_load_file: Unsupported file type
KLD vmxnet.ko: depends on kernel - not available or version mismatch
linker_load_file: Unsupported file type
KLD vmblock.ko: depends on kernel - not available or version mismatch
linker_load_file: Unsupported file type

Below are some details about my setup:

FreeBSD CLONE-VM-SRV01 11.1-BETA3 FreeBSD 11.1-BETA3 #0 r320264: Sun Jun 25 17:48:22 CEST 2017     serbskir@CLONE-VM-SRV01:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/BSD112017062501VM  amd64

open-vm-tools was compiled with:

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DNET
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=ICU
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LIBNOTIFY
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=OPENSSL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=X11

# kldstat 
Id Refs Address            Size     Name
 1    5 0xffffffff80200000 ad1210   kernel
 2    1 0xffffffff80e11000 98a      pflog.ko
 3    1 0xffffffff80e12000 2aa10    pf.ko

# ls -al /usr/local/lib/vmware-tools/modules/drivers/vm*
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  29672 Aug 27 13:01 /usr/local/lib/vmware-tools/modules/drivers/vmblock.ko
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  24608 Aug 27 13:01 /usr/local/lib/vmware-tools/modules/drivers/vmmemctl.ko
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  21336 Aug 27 13:01 /usr/local/lib/vmware-tools/modules/drivers/vmxnet.ko

I'm under ESXi 5.5u1-1746018.

Thank you.
